title: GUI TP Manager
description: Graphical Administrator Interface to manage users' teleportations
body:
# TP Manager: Simplified Teleportation for Minecraft

### The practical solution for moving around your Minecraft server world

TP Manager Fabric Mod offers a simple and efficient way to teleport in Minecraft 1.21.4, either through commands or using a special item. This Fabric mod is designed for players and administrators looking for a practical alternative to traditional movement methods.

## Features:

 - **Dual access:** Use the `/tp4mods` command or the special item, according to your preference.
- **Player-to-player teleportation:** Connect easily with other users.
- **Simple graphical interface:** Quickly visualize and select destinations.
- **Admin functionalities:** Additional tools for server management.
- **Compatible with Fabric 1.21.4:** Specifically developed for the latest version

> Whether you prefer using commands or the dedicated item, TP4Mods allows you to move around your Minecraft world more efficiently, saving you time and effort.
